metadata.source: O*NET Online (U.S. Department of Labor), Bureau of Labor Statistics Occupational Outlook Handbook 2023-24, LinkedIn Jobs Report 2024, manual curation

roles.title: Data Scientist
roles.description: Data Scientists extract insights from complex datasets using statistical methods, machine learning, and programming. They work across the full data lifecycle—from raw data collection and cleaning to model building and communicating findings to stakeholders.
responsibilities: Build and evaluate predictive models using supervised and unsupervised ML techniques
Clean, transform, and explore large datasets to identify patterns
Collaborate with engineering teams to deploy models to production
Communicate findings and recommendations to non-technical stakeholders
Design and analyse A/B experiments
roles.demand_reason: Explosive growth in data-driven decision making across all industries; listed among top 10 fastest-growing jobs globally

roles.title: Machine Learning Engineer
roles.description: ML Engineers bridge data science and software engineering, focusing on building robust, scalable infrastructure for machine learning models. They take models from research and deploy them reliably at production scale.
responsibilities: Design and implement scalable ML pipelines and training infrastructure
Deploy and monitor ML models in production environments
Optimise model performance, latency, and resource usage
Collaborate with data scientists to productionise research models
Build feature stores and data pipelines for model training
roles.demand_reason: Massive demand as companies move from experimental ML to production AI systems at scale

roles.title: AI Research Engineer
roles.description: AI Research Engineers work at the frontier of artificial intelligence, designing novel algorithms and architectures. They combine strong mathematical foundations with engineering skills to push the state of the art in ML research.
responsibilities: Design and experiment with novel ML architectures and training methods
Read, reproduce, and extend state-of-the-art research papers
Implement research prototypes and benchmark against baselines
Publish and present findings at top conferences
Collaborate with applied teams to transfer research to products
roles.demand_reason: AI arms race among top tech companies and well-funded startups creating huge demand for research talent

roles.title: Data Analyst
roles.description: Data Analysts collect, process, and perform statistical analyses on large datasets to help organisations make data-driven decisions. They translate numbers into clear, actionable insights and communicate findings through reports and dashboards.
responsibilities: Query databases to extract relevant data for business questions
Build dashboards and reports for stakeholders
Identify trends and anomalies in business metrics
Work with business teams to define key metrics and KPIs
Perform ad-hoc analyses to support decision-making
roles.demand_reason: Every industry needs professionals who can make sense of growing data volumes for business decisions

roles.title: NLP Engineer
roles.description: NLP Engineers build systems that understand, generate, and process human language. They work on applications like chatbots, translation, sentiment analysis, and large language models.
responsibilities: Design and train language models and text classification systems
Build NLP pipelines for tasks like NER, summarisation, and translation
Fine-tune large language models (LLMs) for specific domains
Evaluate model outputs and handle failure modes
Integrate NLP components into production applications
roles.demand_reason: LLM and generative AI boom creating unprecedented demand for NLP specialists in every sector

roles.title: Computer Vision Engineer
roles.description: Computer Vision Engineers build systems that extract meaning from images and video. Applications include autonomous vehicles, medical imaging, quality control, and augmented reality.
responsibilities: Design and train image classification, detection, and segmentation models
Build data pipelines for image collection, labelling, and augmentation
Optimise models for edge deployment on devices
Work with domain experts to solve real-world vision problems
Evaluate model performance on diverse, real-world datasets
roles.demand_reason: Growth in autonomous systems, robotics, healthcare AI, and industrial automation driving strong demand

roles.title: Data Engineer
roles.description: Data Engineers design and maintain the infrastructure that makes data accessible and usable. They build pipelines, warehouses, and systems that allow analysts and scientists to work effectively.
responsibilities: Design and build reliable ETL/ELT pipelines at scale
Architect data warehouses and data lake solutions
Ensure data quality, lineage, and governance
Optimise query performance and storage costs
Collaborate with data scientists and analysts on data needs
roles.demand_reason: Data infrastructure is foundational to all analytics and ML initiatives; severe shortage of qualified engineers

roles.title: BI Developer
roles.description: BI Developers create and maintain business intelligence solutions, building dashboards, reports, and data models that help organisations understand their performance and make informed decisions.
responsibilities: Design and develop interactive dashboards and reports
Build and optimise data models for reporting
Work with stakeholders to understand reporting requirements
Maintain and optimise BI infrastructure
Train end users on BI tools
roles.demand_reason: Steady demand as organisations continue investing in data-driven decision-making platforms

roles.title: Quantitative Analyst
roles.description: Quantitative Analysts apply mathematical and statistical methods to financial and risk modelling. They develop algorithms for trading, pricing, and risk management in financial institutions.
responsibilities: Build quantitative models for trading strategies and risk assessment
Analyse financial data and backtest trading strategies
Implement statistical and machine learning models for pricing
Work with technology teams to deploy models to trading systems
Monitor and improve model performance
roles.demand_reason: Financial sector ongoing investment in algorithmic trading, risk management, and quantitative strategies

roles.title: Growth / Marketing Analyst
roles.description: Growth Analysts combine data analysis and marketing knowledge to optimise user acquisition, retention, and monetisation. They design and analyse experiments to improve product and campaign performance.
responsibilities: Analyse user acquisition funnels and identify drop-off points
Design and analyse A/B tests for product and marketing campaigns
Build dashboards to track growth metrics and KPIs
Collaborate with marketing and product teams on growth experiments
Synthesise insights into actionable recommendations
roles.demand_reason: Increasing need for data-driven marketing and growth strategies across all digital businesses

roles.title: Product Manager
roles.description: Product Managers define the vision, strategy, and roadmap for products. They work at the intersection of business, technology, and user experience, prioritising what gets built and why.
responsibilities: Define product vision and strategy aligned with business goals
Gather and prioritise product requirements from stakeholders
Work with engineering and design teams to deliver features
Analyse product metrics and user feedback to drive decisions
Communicate product roadmap to executives and teams
roles.demand_reason: Every tech product requires skilled PMs; strong demand across SaaS, consumer, and enterprise

roles.title: Business Analyst
roles.description: Business Analysts bridge the gap between business needs and technology solutions. They analyse processes, gather requirements, and help organisations improve efficiency and achieve goals.
responsibilities: Gather and document business requirements from stakeholders
Analyse existing processes and identify improvement opportunities
Translate business requirements into technical specifications
Facilitate workshops and interviews with stakeholders
Validate solutions against original requirements
roles.demand_reason: Steady need for professionals who bridge business and technology across all industries

roles.title: Strategy Consultant
roles.description: Strategy Consultants help organisations solve complex business problems and make strategic decisions. They analyse markets, competitors, and operations to deliver data-backed recommendations.
responsibilities: Conduct market and competitive landscape analysis
Develop strategic recommendations for clients
Build financial and business models to support decisions
Present insights and recommendations to senior leadership
Manage client relationships and project delivery
roles.demand_reason: Demand for strategic advisory remains strong during digital transformation and economic uncertainty

roles.title: Operations Analyst
roles.description: Operations Analysts improve the efficiency and effectiveness of business operations through data analysis, process improvement, and system design.
responsibilities: Analyse operational data to identify inefficiencies
Design and implement process improvements
Build reports and dashboards to monitor operations
Work with operations teams to implement changes
Track and report on performance metrics
roles.demand_reason: Every organisation needs to optimise operations, especially with supply chain and logistics complexity

roles.title: Backend Developer
roles.description: Backend Developers build the server-side logic, databases, and APIs that power applications. They focus on performance, scalability, and reliability of the systems that users and clients interact with.
responsibilities: Design and implement server-side application logic
Build and maintain REST APIs and microservices
Design and optimise database schemas and queries
Ensure application security, performance, and reliability
Write unit and integration tests
roles.demand_reason: Backend development is fundamental to every software product; massive ongoing demand

roles.title: Frontend Developer
roles.description: Frontend Developers build the user-facing side of web applications, creating the interfaces users see and interact with. They translate designs into functional, accessible, and performant web experiences.
responsibilities: Build responsive and accessible web interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Implement UI components using frameworks like React or Vue
Collaborate with designers to implement visual designs accurately
Optimise web performance and page load times
Write unit and end-to-end tests for frontend code
roles.demand_reason: Web remains the primary delivery platform for software; demand for skilled frontend devs is sustained

roles.title: Full Stack Developer
roles.description: Full Stack Developers are comfortable building both frontend and backend components of web applications. They have breadth across the stack, making them valuable for startups and cross-functional teams.
responsibilities: Build end-to-end features spanning frontend and backend systems
Design database schemas and write server-side logic
Implement responsive user interfaces
Deploy applications and configure cloud infrastructure
Collaborate with designers and product managers
roles.demand_reason: High demand especially in startups and mid-size companies that value breadth over specialisation

roles.title: Software Architect
roles.description: Software Architects make high-level design decisions and establish technical standards for software systems. They ensure that systems are scalable, maintainable, and aligned with business requirements.
responsibilities: Design system architectures and evaluate trade-offs
Define technical standards, patterns, and best practices
Review code and architecture decisions across teams
Work with stakeholders to align technical direction with business goals
Evaluate and select technologies and third-party services
roles.demand_reason: Senior-level role with specialised demand; increasingly important as systems grow in complexity

roles.title: Mobile Developer (iOS/Android)
roles.description: Mobile Developers build applications for smartphones and tablets. They specialise in native iOS (Swift), Android (Kotlin), or cross-platform (Flutter/React Native) development.
responsibilities: Build native or cross-platform mobile applications
Integrate with backend APIs and third-party SDKs
Ensure smooth performance and great UX on mobile devices
Handle platform-specific features like cameras and notifications
Submit and manage app store releases
roles.demand_reason: Mobile-first world driving sustained demand for developers who can build polished native experiences

roles.title: Game Developer
roles.description: Game Developers design and build interactive games and simulations. They work with game engines, graphics, physics, and gameplay programming to create immersive experiences.
responsibilities: Implement gameplay mechanics, physics, and AI using game engines
Write performant C++ or C# code for game systems
Collaborate with artists, designers, and audio engineers
Optimise game performance for target platforms
Debug and profile complex real-time systems
roles.demand_reason: Gaming is one of the largest entertainment industries; demand stable with peaks in mobile and VR/AR

roles.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
roles.description: Embedded Systems Engineers develop software for hardware-constrained devices such as IoT sensors, automotive systems, medical devices, and industrial controllers.
responsibilities: Write low-level C/C++ firmware for microcontrollers
Interface with hardware components and communication protocols
Optimise code for memory and processing constraints
Debug hardware-software integration issues
Ensure safety and reliability requirements are met
roles.demand_reason: IoT expansion and automotive electrification driving demand for embedded talent

roles.title: API Developer
roles.description: API Developers specialise in designing, building, and maintaining APIs that allow different systems and applications to communicate. They focus on RESTful, GraphQL, and event-driven interfaces.
responsibilities: Design API contracts and schemas
Implement and document REST and GraphQL APIs
Ensure API security, versioning, and performance
Write SDKs and developer documentation
Manage API gateways and rate limiting
roles.demand_reason: API economy is foundational to modern software; every SaaS product needs well-designed APIs

roles.title: UX Designer
roles.description: UX Designers create meaningful and usable digital experiences. They research user needs, design interaction flows, and validate solutions through testing to ensure products are intuitive and effective.
responsibilities: Conduct user research including interviews, surveys, and usability tests
Create user journeys, wireframes, and interactive prototypes
Collaborate with UI designers and developers to deliver designs
Analyse user feedback and iterate on designs
Advocate for user needs in product decisions
roles.demand_reason: User experience is a key competitive differentiator; demand growing as product quality bar rises

roles.title: UI Designer
roles.description: UI Designers create the visual elements of digital interfaces—typography, colour, layout, and components. They work closely with UX designers and developers to produce polished, consistent designs.
responsibilities: Design high-fidelity visual interfaces and component libraries
Create and maintain design systems
Ensure visual consistency across products
Collaborate with developers on implementation
Iterate designs based on user and stakeholder feedback
roles.demand_reason: Strong demand especially in product companies investing heavily in design quality

roles.title: UX Researcher
roles.description: UX Researchers are specialists in understanding user behaviour, needs, and motivations. They design and conduct qualitative and quantitative research studies to inform product decisions.
responsibilities: Design and conduct qualitative research (interviews, ethnographic studies)
Run quantitative surveys and analyse results
Synthesise research findings into actionable insights
Present research findings to design and product teams
Advocate for evidence-based design decisions
roles.demand_reason: Growing recognition that user research reduces costly product failures and increases retention

roles.title: Interaction Designer
roles.description: Interaction Designers focus on how users interact with digital products—micro-interactions, transitions, gestures, and feedback. They bridge UX and UI, focusing on behaviour and motion design.
responsibilities: Design and document interaction patterns and micro-interactions
Create detailed prototypes that simulate real product behaviour
Develop motion design guidelines
Work with engineers to implement interactions precisely
Conduct usability testing on interaction patterns
roles.demand_reason: Rising product quality expectations creating demand for specialists in interaction quality

roles.title: Product Designer
roles.description: Product Designers own the end-to-end design of digital products, spanning user research, UX flows, and visual design. They work across strategy and execution to shape the full user experience.
responsibilities: Own the end-to-end design process for product features
Balance user needs with business goals and technical constraints
Create research-informed wireframes and high-fidelity designs
Build and maintain components in the design system
Present and defend design decisions to stakeholders
roles.demand_reason: Design-led product development widely adopted; senior product designers increasingly influential in companies

roles.title: Accessibility Specialist
roles.description: Accessibility Specialists ensure digital products are usable by people with disabilities. They audit products for WCAG compliance, train teams, and advocate for inclusive design practices.
responsibilities: Audit products for WCAG 2.1/2.2 compliance
Train design and development teams on accessibility
Write accessibility guidelines and documentation
Work with assistive technology users on testing
Advocate for inclusive design at the product level
roles.demand_reason: Growing legal requirements (ADA, EAA) and genuine user need driving investment in accessibility expertise

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.description: DevOps Engineers bridge development and operations, building and maintaining the infrastructure and workflows that let teams deliver software faster and more reliably.
responsibilities: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments
Manage cloud infrastructure using IaC tools like Terraform
Monitor system health, performance, and reliability
Automate repetitive operational tasks
Collaborate with developers on deployment strategies
roles.demand_reason: DevOps practices now standard across engineering organisations; strong demand shows no sign of slowing

roles.title: Cloud Architect
roles.description: Cloud Architects design enterprise-scale cloud environments. They define cloud strategy, select services, design for security and cost-efficiency, and lead cloud migrations.
responsibilities: Design scalable, secure, and cost-efficient cloud architectures
Lead cloud migration strategies and execution
Define cloud governance, security, and compliance policies
Evaluate and select cloud services across providers
Guide engineering teams on cloud best practices
roles.demand_reason: Cloud adoption accelerating globally; architects needed to design compliant, cost-efficient systems

roles.title: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
roles.description: SREs apply software engineering principles to operations, focusing on reliability, scalability, and performance of production systems. They define SLOs and manage incidents.
responsibilities: Define and monitor SLOs, SLAs, and error budgets
Respond to and lead incident management
Build tooling to improve system reliability and observability
Conduct post-mortems and drive systemic improvements
Automate toil and manual operational tasks
roles.demand_reason: Critical for production systems at scale; SRE teams now standard in mid-to-large engineering orgs

roles.title: Platform Engineer
roles.description: Platform Engineers build internal developer platforms and tooling that enable product teams to deploy, operate, and observe their services independently.
responsibilities: Build and maintain internal developer platforms (IDPs)
Define golden paths for service deployment and observability
Abstract infrastructure complexity for product engineers
Manage shared infrastructure components and services
Drive developer experience improvements
roles.demand_reason: Emerging discipline gaining traction as engineering organisations seek to scale developer productivity

roles.title: Security Engineer
roles.description: Security Engineers design and implement security controls, threat models, and defences for software systems. They work across the SDLC to embed security into product development.
responsibilities: Design and implement security architecture and controls
Conduct threat modelling and security reviews
Perform penetration testing and vulnerability assessments
Build and maintain security tooling and automation
Respond to and lead security incidents
roles.demand_reason: Cybersecurity threats escalating globally; massive shortage of qualified security engineers

roles.title: Network Engineer
roles.description: Network Engineers design, implement, and manage computer networks that connect systems and enable communication. They work on LAN/WAN, routing, switching, and network security.
responsibilities: Design and configure network topologies and routing protocols
Manage firewalls, load balancers, and network security policies
Monitor network performance and troubleshoot issues
Plan and execute network infrastructure upgrades
Document network architecture and configurations
roles.demand_reason: Foundational role; demand stable with growing need for cloud networking expertise

roles.title: Reinforcement Learning Engineer
roles.description: Reinforcement Learning Engineers design and train agents that learn to make sequences of decisions through interaction with environments. Applications include robotics, games, and autonomous systems.
responsibilities: Design RL environments and reward functions
Implement and tune RL algorithms (PPO, SAC, DQN)
Evaluate agent behaviour and diagnose training instabilities
Apply RL to real-world decision-making problems
Collaborate with robotics and simulation engineers
roles.demand_reason: Niche but high-value specialisation growing with robotics, autonomous systems, and RLHF in LLMs

roles.title: MLOps Engineer
roles.description: MLOps Engineers specialise in the operational side of machine learning—automating model training, deployment, monitoring, and retraining workflows to ensure production ML systems are reliable.
responsibilities: Build automated ML training and evaluation pipelines
Set up model monitoring for drift and performance degradation
Manage model versioning, registration, and serving
Integrate ML workflows with CI/CD systems
Enable data scientists to deploy models self-service
roles.demand_reason: Growing recognition that most ML value is lost without proper operationalisation

roles.title: Data Governance Analyst
roles.description: Data Governance Analysts establish and enforce policies for data quality, privacy, and lifecycle management across an organisation.
responsibilities: Define and enforce data quality standards and policies
Maintain data catalogues and lineage documentation
Ensure compliance with GDPR and other data regulations
Work with data teams on data stewardship practices
Conduct data quality audits
roles.demand_reason: GDPR and data regulation globally creating demand for governance specialists

roles.title: Scrum Master
roles.description: Scrum Masters facilitate Agile delivery processes for software teams. They coach teams on Scrum practices, remove impediments, and ensure continuous improvement.
responsibilities: Facilitate Scrum ceremonies (stand-ups, retrospectives, sprint planning)
Remove blockers and impediments for the development team
Coach teams and stakeholders on Agile mindset
Track and communicate team velocity and capacity
Drive continuous improvement through retrospectives
roles.demand_reason: Agile adoption widespread; demand stable as organisations continue improving delivery practices

roles.title: Technical Writer
roles.description: Technical Writers create documentation that makes complex software and systems understandable. They produce API docs, user guides, tutorials, and developer documentation.
responsibilities: Write, edit, and maintain technical documentation
Create API references, guides, and tutorials
Work with engineers to understand and document systems
Maintain documentation toolchains (docs-as-code)
Gather feedback and improve documentation quality
roles.demand_reason: Growing developer tool and API economy creating demand for quality technical writing

roles.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
roles.description: Cybersecurity Analysts monitor, detect, and respond to security threats and incidents. They protect systems by implementing controls, analysing logs, and conducting threat intelligence.
responsibilities: Monitor security alerts and investigate potential incidents
Analyse threat intelligence and vulnerability reports
Conduct security assessments and risk evaluations
Implement and manage security controls and tooling
Write incident reports and recommend remediation
roles.demand_reason: Cybersecurity threats increasing in frequency and sophistication; global talent shortage

roles.title: Data Architect
roles.description: Data Architects design the overall structure of data systems and platforms, setting standards for how data is stored, managed, accessed, and governed at scale.
responsibilities: Design enterprise-wide data architecture strategies
Define data modelling standards and best practices
Select and evaluate data platform technologies
Guide data engineering teams on implementation
Ensure data architecture meets compliance and business needs
roles.demand_reason: As data complexity grows, organisations need architects to create coherent, scalable data strategies

roles.title: Robotics Engineer
roles.description: Robotics Engineers design and program robotic systems, combining hardware interfacing, control systems, and AI to build machines that can perceive and act in the real world.
responsibilities: Design and implement robot perception, planning, and control systems
Work with ROS and simulation environments
Integrate sensors and actuators into robotic systems
Test and validate robot behaviour in simulation and the real world
Collaborate with mechanical and electrical engineers
roles.demand_reason: Autonomous vehicles, warehouse robotics, and surgical robots driving rapid growth in the field

roles.title: AR/VR Developer
roles.description: AR/VR Developers create immersive augmented and virtual reality applications for gaming, training, healthcare, and enterprise use cases.
responsibilities: Develop AR/VR applications using Unity or Unreal Engine
Implement spatial computing features like tracking and hand interaction
Optimise performance for VR headsets and mobile AR
Collaborate with 3D artists and UX designers on immersive experiences
Test and debug on target hardware
roles.demand_reason: Spatial computing gaining momentum with Vision Pro and Quest; enterprise XR training growing rapidly

roles.title: Blockchain Developer
roles.description: Blockchain Developers build decentralised applications, smart contracts, and protocols on blockchain platforms like Ethereum and Solana.
responsibilities: Write and audit smart contracts in Solidity or Rust
Build dApps with blockchain integration
Implement token standards and DeFi protocols
Ensure security of smart contracts and on-chain logic
Work with cryptographic primitives and consensus mechanisms
roles.demand_reason: Web3 and DeFi ecosystem drives demand, though more cyclical than other engineering roles

roles.title: Cloud Data Engineer
roles.description: Cloud Data Engineers build and manage data infrastructure specifically on cloud platforms, leveraging managed services for scalable, serverless, and real-time data processing.
responsibilities: Build serverless data pipelines using cloud-native services
Manage data lakes and cloud data warehouses
Implement real-time streaming data architectures
Ensure data security and compliance in cloud environments
Optimise cloud data costs and performance
roles.demand_reason: Cloud-first strategies adopted across organisations; cloud data engineering is now the default

roles.title: Digital Product Manager
roles.description: Digital Product Managers oversee the strategy and execution of digital products, combining product thinking with digital analytics, experimentation, and growth strategies.
responsibilities: Define digital product strategy and roadmap
Run data-driven experiments to improve product metrics
Work with design and engineering to build digital features
Analyse user behaviour data to identify opportunities
Prioritise backlog based on business impact and user need
roles.demand_reason: Digital product sophistication increasing; every company is now a digital company

roles.title: Research Scientist (Academia / Industry)
roles.description: Research Scientists generate new knowledge through rigorous scientific inquiry. In industry they focus on applied research; in academia they contribute to fundamental scientific advances.
responsibilities: Design and execute research experiments and studies
Analyse and synthesise results to draw conclusions
Write and publish papers in peer-reviewed venues
Present findings at conferences and to internal stakeholders
Collaborate with cross-disciplinary research teams
roles.demand_reason: Both academia and industry research labs growing; especially strong demand in AI research

roles.title: DevSecOps Engineer
roles.description: DevSecOps Engineers embed security practices into DevOps pipelines, ensuring security is built into software delivery from the start rather than added at the end.
responsibilities: Integrate security scanning into CI/CD pipelines (SAST, DAST, SCA)
Build and maintain security automation tooling
Define secure-by-default infrastructure patterns
Train development teams on secure coding practices
Manage secrets and credential management systems
roles.demand_reason: Security-in-SDLC regulatory requirements and increasing attack surface driving demand

roles.title: Digital Transformation Consultant
roles.description: Digital Transformation Consultants help organisations adopt digital technologies and change working practices to improve efficiency, customer experience, and competitive positioning.
responsibilities: Assess clients' digital maturity and identify transformation opportunities
Define digital transformation roadmaps and change strategies
Lead workshops with executive and operational stakeholders
Track and report on transformation programme progress
Build business cases for technology investments
roles.demand_reason: All industries undergoing digital transformation; consulting demand remains very strong

roles.title: AI Ethics Researcher
roles.description: AI Ethics Researchers study and address the social, ethical, and legal implications of artificial intelligence. They work on fairness, accountability, transparency, and safety in AI systems.
responsibilities: Research and document AI fairness, bias, and safety issues
Develop frameworks and tools for responsible AI development
Work with policy makers, legal teams, and engineers
Audit AI systems for bias and harmful outcomes
Publish research and contribute to policy development
roles.demand_reason: Regulatory pressure (EU AI Act) and public accountability creating demand for AI ethics expertise

roles.title: Data Journalist
roles.description: Data Journalists use data analysis and visualisation to uncover and tell compelling stories. They work at the intersection of journalism, data analysis, and visual communication.
responsibilities: Source, collect, and clean datasets for investigative stories
Analyse data to identify newsworthy patterns and trends
Create compelling data visualisations for digital and print media
Write data-driven narratives accessible to general audiences
Collaborate with editors and graphic designers
roles.demand_reason: Growing interest in evidence-based journalism and visual storytelling online

roles.title: Computational Linguist
roles.description: Computational Linguists combine linguistics and computer science to build systems that process and understand human language. They contribute to NLP, speech recognition, and language resource development.
responsibilities: Annotate and curate linguistic datasets for NLP tasks
Research language phenomena relevant to NLP system design
Build and evaluate language processing pipelines
Work with lexicographers and linguists on language resources
Analyse model errors from a linguistic perspective
roles.demand_reason: LLM era increasing demand for linguistic expertise in training data curation and evaluation

roles.title: Digital Analytics Specialist
roles.description: Digital Analytics Specialists collect and analyse data from digital channels—websites, apps, and campaigns—to optimise user experience and marketing ROI.
responsibilities: Implement and maintain web and app tracking systems
Analyse user behaviour, conversion funnels, and campaign performance
Build dashboards to monitor digital performance
Collaborate with marketing and UX teams on optimisation
Report insights to stakeholders and recommend actions
roles.demand_reason: All digital businesses rely on data to optimise performance; steady demand across industries

roles.title: Prompt Engineer
roles.description: Prompt Engineers design, test, and optimise prompts for large language models to elicit desired outputs. They build prompt libraries, evaluation frameworks, and LLM-powered products.
responsibilities: Design and iterate on prompts for specific LLM tasks
Build evaluation frameworks to measure LLM output quality
Develop and maintain prompt libraries and templates
Fine-tune and align LLM behaviour for specific applications
Collaborate with product and engineering teams on LLM integration
roles.demand_reason: Rapid adoption of LLMs creating immediate demand for specialists who can extract reliable outputs

roles.title: Information Architect
roles.description: Information Architects design the structure, organisation, and navigation of information in digital products and platforms, making complex content findable and understandable.
responsibilities: Design site maps, taxonomies, and navigation structures
Conduct card sorting and tree testing studies
Collaborate with content strategists and UX designers
Create wireframes focused on information hierarchy
Evaluate and improve findability of content
roles.demand_reason: Growing complexity of digital products requiring specialists in content structure and navigation

roles.title: Voice UI Designer
roles.description: Voice UI Designers create conversational interfaces for voice assistants, chatbots, and IVR systems, focusing on dialogue design, conversation flows, and audio experience.
responsibilities: Design conversation flows and dialogue scripts for voice interfaces
Conduct voice-specific user research and testing
Define voice brand personality and tone of voice
Collaborate with NLP engineers on intent and entity design
Iterate designs based on dialogue analysis data
roles.demand_reason: LLM and voice assistant growth creating demand for specialists in conversational UX

roles.title: No-Code / Low-Code Developer
roles.description: No-Code / Low-Code Developers build applications, automations, and workflows using platforms like Webflow, Bubble, or Zapier, often translating business needs into functional products without traditional coding.
responsibilities: Build web apps and automations using no-code/low-code platforms
Connect APIs and third-party services via integration tools
Gather requirements from business users
Maintain and iterate on no-code solutions
Document workflows and train end users
roles.demand_reason: No-code platforms proliferating; businesses seeking faster, lower-cost development options

roles.title: E-Commerce Manager
roles.description: E-Commerce Managers oversee digital commerce platforms, optimising product listings, customer journeys, and conversion rates to drive online sales.
responsibilities: Manage and optimise e-commerce platform performance
Analyse sales data and conversion funnels
Coordinate product listings, pricing, and promotions
Work with marketing on acquisition and retention campaigns
Improve customer experience and reduce cart abandonment
roles.demand_reason: Continued growth of online retail across all product categories driving sustained demand

roles.title: GIS Analyst
roles.description: GIS Analysts collect, manage, and analyse geographic and spatial data to support decision-making in areas like urban planning, environmental management, logistics, and public health.
responsibilities: Build and maintain geographic information systems and datasets
Perform spatial analysis and produce maps
Integrate GIS data with business intelligence tools
Collaborate with planners, engineers, and scientists
Develop geospatial workflows and automations in Python
roles.demand_reason: Location data increasingly valuable in logistics, urban planning, climate, and public health

roles.title: Digital Health Analyst
roles.description: Digital Health Analysts apply data science and analytics techniques to healthcare datasets to improve patient outcomes, operational efficiency, and public health insights.
responsibilities: Analyse patient, clinical, and operational healthcare data
Build predictive models for patient outcomes and risk stratification
Visualise health data for clinicians and administrators
Ensure compliance with health data privacy regulations (HIPAA, GDPR)
Collaborate with clinicians and health IT teams
roles.demand_reason: Healthcare digitalisation and pandemic-driven investment in health analytics accelerating demand

roles.title: Supply Chain Data Analyst
roles.description: Supply Chain Data Analysts use data to optimise logistics, inventory, procurement, and distribution networks for efficiency and resilience.
responsibilities: Analyse supply chain data to identify bottlenecks and inefficiencies
Build dashboards for inventory, demand, and logistics KPIs
Develop demand forecasting models
Work with operations and procurement on data-driven improvements
Monitor supplier performance and risk metrics
roles.demand_reason: Supply chain disruptions highlighting need for data-driven resilience planning

roles.title: Fintech Developer
roles.description: Fintech Developers build financial technology products including payments, lending, investing, and insurance platforms, with strong requirements for security, reliability, and compliance.
responsibilities: Build secure and compliant financial software applications
Integrate payment gateways and financial APIs
Implement fraud detection and risk management features
Ensure regulatory compliance (PCI-DSS, PSD2, etc.)
Design high-availability, low-latency financial systems
roles.demand_reason: Fintech sector continues strong growth; traditional banks also digitising rapidly

roles.title: Human Factors Engineer
roles.description: Human Factors Engineers apply psychological and physiological principles to the design of systems, products, and environments, particularly in safety-critical domains like aviation, healthcare, and automotive.
responsibilities: Apply human factors principles to product and system design
Conduct workload and usability assessments
Evaluate designs for safety and error reduction
Work with regulatory bodies on compliance
Design experiments and analyse human performance data
roles.demand_reason: Safety-critical industries (aviation, automotive, healthcare) increasing UX rigour requirements
